title: Todo list edit and length
excerpt: The To-Do List widget should allow users to edit items instead of just marking them as complete or deleting them. Additionally, items should support longer text, as the current two-line limit is too restrictive.

posts.author: Overlook (Cody)
posts.cookedHtml: The To-Do List widget should allow users to edit items instead of just marking them as complete or deleting them. Additionally, items should support longer text, as the current two-line limit is too restrictive.

posts.author: kelseyotley (Kelsey Otley)
posts.cookedHtml:
Just added a ToDo List to my board and like the idea.

A couple important feature requests to curb frusteration:

  1. Users should be allowed to edit the text of a task once created (think spelling errors!)

  2. Users should be able to re-order the To-Do list tasks by drag and drop!
